arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim risks repeating Erik ten Hag transfer mistake as he eyes first Man Utd deal
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim is reportedly targeting a move for his former Sporting Lisbon left-back Nuno Mendes, carrying on a trait from Erik ten Hag's reign after the Dutchman brought a number of his old players to Manchester United

arts.ttl: Why Gary Neville is not at Ipswich vs Man United despite Sky Sports Ruben Amorim interview
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news and gossip as Gary Neville will not be part of Sky Sports' coverage of Ipswich vs United in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Amorim to hand 16-year-old Man Utd wonderkid his debut
arts.sum: According to Academy Scoop and Fabrizio Romano, 16-year-old Godwill Kukonki is expected to make the squad for Ipswich. Amorim to hand 16-year-old Man Utd wonderkid his debut

arts.ttl: Man Utd line up transfer not approved by Ruben Amorim despite public demand
arts.sum: Manchester United had identified Sporting Lisbon teenager Geovany Quenda as a target before Ruben Amorim's arrival and are still ready to pursue the youngster despite their manager's stance on transfers

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford delivered Manchester United ultimatum amid 'pivotal moment' with Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Rashford's form has dipped across the last couple of seasons and he has been sent a warning by a former United coach

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim is set to include SIXTEEN-year-old centre back Godwill Kukonki on the bench in his first squad as Man United head coach - with Red Devils short of defensive cover for Ipswich clash
arts.sum: Amorim will take charge of the Red Devils for the first time on Sunday when his side visit Ipswich , with the Portuguese boss having replaced Erik ten Hag earlier this month.

arts.ttl: Manchester United XI vs Ipswich – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim begins his reign as Manchester United manager this weekend, as the Red Devils take on Ipswich Town at Portman Road. There will be a sense of intrigue and optimism around Manchester United on Sunday, when Amorim leads the side for the first time. arts.ttl: Every Man United manager’s first game since Alex Ferguson retired
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim takes charge of Manchester United for the first time this weekend, with cautious optimism around the club. Amorim’s achievements with Sporting Lisbon have seen him appointed as the club’s new head coach, tasked with reviving the fortunes of a side who have endured a decade of decline. arts.ttl: Ipswich vs Manchester United LIVE Ruben Amorim's first game updates, early team news and how to watch
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, George Smith, Steven Railston)
arts.sum: Live updates from Ruben Amorim's first game in charge of Man United as they face Ipswich Town in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: 'Ruben Amorim's success at Man Utd doesn't depend on him - lessons have to be learned'
arts.sum: "There’s a pretty good chance that if the Glazer family or Sir Jim Ratcliffe owned the club when Busby and Ferguson were in their pomp they wouldn’t have survived to build their dynasties."
